summary.zh: 在拖拽排序时保持拾取、占位和落点状态清楚。
summary.en: Keep pickup, placeholder, and drop states clear while reordering.

definition.zh: 拖动列表项来重新排序，其他项目会移动并让出位置。
definition.en: Dragging an item changes its list position while surrounding items animate toward their prospective slots.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 在列表重排过程中保持拾取对象、占位位置和最终落点清楚。
purpose.en: Keep the picked item, placeholder, and final drop location clear during list reordering.

frequency.zh: 适合用户主动整理的中低频任务；自动排序场景无需拖拽。
frequency.en: Use for user-driven low- to medium-frequency organization; automatic sorting needs no drag interaction.

trigger.zh: 由拖拽手柄的 pointerdown 或键盘拾取命令触发。
trigger.en: Trigger from pointerdown on a drag handle or a keyboard pickup command.

enterExit.zh: 拾取时元素升层，移动时邻项让位，放下后所有项目收敛到最终布局。
enterExit.en: Raise the item on pickup, shift neighbors during movement, and settle all items into final layout on drop.

interruptibility.zh: 拖拽可随时取消并返回原位；新目标位置实时替换旧占位。
interruptibility.en: Allow cancellation back to the origin at any time, updating the placeholder live as the target changes.

gestureRules.zh: 设置专用手柄、触摸启动阈值、自动滚动边缘，并提供键盘移动与宣布位置。
gestureRules.en: Provide a dedicated handle, touch activation threshold, edge auto-scroll, keyboard movement, and position announcements.

reducedMotion.zh: 取消跟手移动动画，使用拾取状态、目标位置高亮和即时排序结果。
reducedMotion.en: Remove follow-pointer animation and use pickup state, target highlighting, and an immediate reorder result.

reviewNotes.zh: 测试长列表、滚动容器和跨组边界。
reviewNotes.en: Test long lists, scroll containers, and group boundaries.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保排序结果持久化失败时可恢复。
reviewNotes.en: Restore the previous order if persistence fails.
